description_long: This is a classical acoustic guitar with a traditional hourglass-shaped wooden body, featuring a dark brown finish and a visible soundhole with a decorative rosette. The guitar has six strings running from the bridge on the body to the headstock, passing over a fretted fingerboard. The neck is long and slender, connecting the body to a rectangular headstock equipped with three tuning pegs on each side. The bridge and fretboard appear to be made of a darker wood, contrasting with the lighter brown of the body. The guitar's surface is smooth and slightly glossy, reflecting light subtly. No visible electronics or pickups are present, indicating it is a purely acoustic instrument.
description: A classical acoustic guitar with a dark brown wooden body, six strings, and a smooth, slightly glossy finish. The instrument features a traditional shape, a decorative soundhole, and a rectangular headstock with tuning pegs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the soundhole, rosette, strings, and full fingerboard leading to the headstock.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's body depth, neck length, and the flatness of the top and back surfaces.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the body and neck, with the headstock and tuning pegs visible from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, similar to view 1, showing the body thickness and neck extension.
attribute_headstock_design: Rectangular headstock with three tuning pegs on each side, no visible logo or distinctive cutouts
